channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins full, 1st March
item.description:
Bins full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped south pavement just before bridge, 1st March
item.description:
Mattress just before Bridge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Penge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goodwin House estate cleaning has been neglected the windows is filled with mould black mode cobwebs has not been cleaned. Window is cleaning size on the wall need cleaning., 1st March
item.description:
We are not getting regular cleaning being done,we have black mould on windows as you can see on photo hasn’t been cleaned. cleaning and side walls we haven’t even had a floor mop for weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Crescent, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking too close to the driveway, 1st March
item.description:
Vehicles are frequently parking too close to the driveway making it difficult and unsafe to exit because visibility of approaching traffic is restricted. With local schools nearby and many children walking in the area during busy times this creates an unnecessary safety risk for residents, drivers and pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Firs Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overfilled electrical recycling bank N16 9JY — items being removed and left outside, 1st March
item.description:
Electrical recycling bank at Albion Road, Hackney N16 9JY (Bank No: 94) is full. Items are being removed through the opening and left outside, causing litter and safety risks. Please increase collection frequency. Container labelled: GIRDA Logistics Ltd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture and sofa cushions, 1st March
item.description:
Yet another incident of fly tipping at this well known hot spot. Please remove. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bin tagged as contaminated, 1st March
item.description:
A Greenwich council green top bin filled with domestic waste has been abandoned and tagged as contaminated by refuse collectors. This waste was fly-tipped in June 2025 when I first notified the council and is on the public footpath of Fairthorn Road between 49 and 51.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairthorn Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gully- 2nd gulley from main road, 1st March
item.description:
Previously reported but still blocked
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwood Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep potholes in middle of the road, 1st March
item.description:
The road surface is breaking up on the cross over section when turning right from Bridge Road onto Northend Road. It is extremely dangerous and it is causing cars to lose grip when turning. It is also going to start causing damage to vehicles, this is a bus route and this section of road keeps getting damaged and needs fixing properly once and for all!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by entrance to Setchell Estate, 1st March
item.description:
There is a constant pile of rubbish at Dunton Rd entrance to Setchell Estate. Please remove before more is added and bags split by animals. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses & other rubbish dumped on Oxenford Street, 1st March
item.description:
Mattresses, old furniture etc flytipped on Oxenford Road near corner with Oglander Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Oxenford Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Portbury estate, 1st March
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish on Portbury estate. Dumped on Sunday lunch time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portbury Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at end of crimscott street at junction with Willow walk, 1st March
item.description:
Fly tipping please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Willows, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wet and decaying leaves on the footpath, 1st March
item.description:
The leaves have not been cleared for months. They are wet and slippery. Also the edges of the paths are full of mud and weeds.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken branch, 1st March
item.description:
A branch that has been broken off, I assume by a van, needs taking away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salisbury Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 55 Brondesbury villas, 1st March
item.description:
Bucket

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Tree branches and hanging debris on overhead electrical wires outside 4 Kellett Road, 1st March
item.description:
There is a tree directly outside 4 Kellett Road with two ongoing safety issues: 1. A large sheet or fabric has been hanging from the upper branches for at least four years. It is draped over and in contact with overhead electrical wiring. This has previously been reported multiple times but has never been removed. Although tree works were apparently carried out on the street in November 2025, this issue was not addressed. 2. Several branches are currently resting on and entangled with the overhead electrical wires. This presents a clear safety risk, particularly in high winds. Given the prolonged nature of the issue and the potential danger involving electrical wiring, this requires urgent inspection and action. Please confirm when this will be addressed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kellett Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no.16 Mikton Rd, 1st March
item.description:
Street light out for about a month ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in red marker on pillar, 1st March
item.description:
This graffiti marking has appeared overnight. A quick google suggests that this in relation to a political march. Please can this be removed ASAP. The location is on the corner of Norman Road and Tarves Way as seen in the photo.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
